name: split_edge_cube_edge0
description: Split edge 0 (the back-left vertical edge, v0-v3) of a unit cube at its midpoint. mesh.split_edge appends one new vertex at the next free index (8) and re-derives edges; the 8 original cube verts stay put.
source: hand-authored (analytic), empirically confirmed against vibe3d /api/model. Grounds: makeCube() verts are +/-0.5 (source/mesh.d:2653); edge 0 = {v0,v3} = first edge of addFace([0,3,2,1]) (also pinned by a green unittest in test_transform.d); addVertex appends without dedup (source/mesh.d) so the midpoint lands at index 8.

provenance.notes: Grounded in source/mesh.d facts (makeCube +/-0.5, edge0 ordering, no-dedup addVertex) and empirically confirmed against vibe3d's own /api/model — not reference-editor-derived.
